programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Blue World Ep612: Global Search for the Rare Dugongs + Cave Diving in Florida, USA
programme.desc: Blue World travels the world on a hunt for Dugongs… rare, shy animals resembling manatees that are very difficult to film. But we get lucky in the Philippines with an incredible once-in-a-lifetime encounter! Then, an amazing cave dive at Peacock Springs in Florida, where Blue World divers do their first “traverse”.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep122: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Evian, France
programme.desc: Round 3 of the UIM F1H2O World Championship Tour was held in Evian, France for a fifth consecutive year as the Grand Prix of France raced on the waters of Lac Leman ("Lake Geneva").

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep603: Paddling Jamaica
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting explores Jamaica’s stunning coastline, mountainous rivers, and epic ocean surf with his sea kayak.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep320: Kayaking the Muksu River in Tajikistan
programme.desc: World of Watersport highlights the film entitled "The Legend of Muksu", which documents spectacular whitewater kayaking of the Muksu River in Tajikistan.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: 9191
programme.desc: 9191 is a sideways introspective into the bewildering snow-covered dreamscape of international time traveler and mystic of the shred - Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: FORTE s a female-founded and led technology company. Launched by Lauren Foundos in 2015, FORTE’s white label streaming platform helps boutique fitness studios, big box gyms and health clubs create premium live and on-demand fitness experiences for members.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: We move to Madrid, the city that hosts the fourth leg of one of the most challenging and demanding show jumping competitions in the world: the Longines Global Champions Tour. With a height over 1.50m, precision is key in order to top the podium. Relive the best moments of the 2022 edition of the LGCT in Madrid.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: Madrid, Spain. The weather forecasts a sunny day with no clouds. An eager audience sits down with excitement waiting for the jump off to begin and the riders get ready to give their all in the fourth leg of the 2022 Global Champions Tour. However, the score could take a turn any time, as the top riders are teaming up for their golden ticket in the Playoffs. Relive the best moments of the fourth leg of the 2022 GCL in Madrid.

programme.title: FEI Jumping World Cup OMAHA - DAY 1
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Valkenswaard has welcomed international riders for the fourth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour this year. Competition is only just beginning but riders have already proven to give their all in The Netherlands. Excitement, excellence and the best show jumping performances are about to take place in the LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Shanghai Swans has once again taken the victory away from Valkenswaard United during the previous leg. However, now we are in the terrain of Valkenswaard United, and they are not going to give up so easily at home. Will they be able to coordinate to ensure their victory or will some other team win the Valkenswaard leg of the Global Champions League? Find out the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Wiesbaden
programme.desc: The second leg in this edition of the Event Rider Masters takes place in the splendid scenery of Biebrich Palace, on the bank of the Rhine River and in the middle of the city of Wiesbaden. This park has been hosting international equestrian competitions for the past 80 years, and are now ready to host this edition of the Event Rider Masters as it debuts in Germany for the first time. Be part of the best moments of the competition in the 2019 edition.

programme.title: The Strange love of Martha Ivers
programme.desc: A man is reunited with his childhood friend and her husband, who believe he knows the truth about the death of her rich aunt years earlier

programme.title: A Star is born
programme.desc: A film star helps a young singer and actress find fame, even as age and alcoholism send his own career on a downward spiral

programme.title: Where You Meet With God
programme.desc: Don’t go for a goal without God this year. When you invite His presence in, He’ll be with you every step of the way, bringing things to the surface, and showing you what to reach for.

programme.title: When You Just Can't Win
programme.desc: If you’re feeling stuck in a cycle of defeat, remember that God’s promises are guaranteed but not automatic. Keep consistently showing up and praising Him for the victories He’s given you, because more are on the way.

programme.title: Look Forward Not Far
programme.desc: We all go through times when we’re looking ahead, and our future looks uncertain. We want clarity, but instead, God gives us the courage to move forward in faith. It’s in these moments we learn not to be driven by what’s easy but to be pulled forward by purpose.

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
